tasks.label: capture it-IT screenshots
args: ./android/gradlew -p android app:assembleDebug app:assembleAndroidTest && adb -s emulator-5554 install -t -r build/app/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb -s emulator-5554 install -t -r build/app/outputs/apk/androidTest/debug/app-debug-androidTest.apk && adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm grant com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo android.permission.CHANGE_CONFIGURATION && adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm grant com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE && adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm grant com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE && adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm grant com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo android.permission.DUMP && adb -s emulator-5554 shell settings put global sysui_demo_allowed 1 && adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo.test && adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo && adb -s emulator-5554 shell am instrument --no-window-animation -w -e testLocale it-IT --no-hidden-api-checks -e appendTimestamp true -e package com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo.test/androidx.test.runner.AndroidJUnitRunner && mkdir -p fastlane/metadata/android/it-IT/images/phoneScreenshots && rm -f fastlane/metadata/android/it-IT/images/phoneScreenshots/*.png && adb -s emulator-5554 pull /sdcard/Android/data/com.github.iweinzierl.paperlessgo/files/screengrab/it-IT/images/screenshots/. fastlane/metadata/android/it-IT/images/phoneScreenshots/

tasks.label: verify metadata lane after draft fix
verify metadata lane after promote-status fix
